overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game, showing a character in a long coat walking along a snowy mountain trail at night. The atmosphere is cold and isolated with blue moonlight illuminating the snow-covered path, pine trees, and rocky terrain as the character approaches and passes a lantern post before entering a more enclosed rocky canyon area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain trail with distant lights

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy path toward distant lantern lights visible ahead

entered.detail: snow-covered trail surface with visible footprints
tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the trail
rocky terrain and boulders on the right side of the path
warm yellow light visible in the distance indicating structures ahead
dark blue night sky with scattered clouds illuminated by moonlight

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide snowy mountain trail at night, with the character walking away from the camera. The landscape features snow-covered ground, pine trees on the sides, and rocky hills to the right. A distant warm lantern glow is visible ahead against the dark blue cloudy night sky, creating a cold but serene atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy trail with lit lantern post and rocky outcrops

events.description: character approaches and passes a lit lantern post on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking past a wooden lantern post emitting warm light, continuing along the narrowing trail

entered.detail: wooden post with a lit lantern providing warm yellow illumination
large rock formation closer to the path creating a wall-like structure

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the snowy trail as the terrain begins to narrow. A lit lantern post appears on the left, casting warm light on the snow as the character passes it. The right side transitions from gentle hills to steeper rocky cliffs closer to the path, while the sky becomes partially obscured by the encroaching terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed rocky canyon path with snow

events.description: trail enters a narrow canyon passage with rock walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow rocky canyon, snow crunching underfoot between the stone walls

entered.detail: tall rock wall forming the left boundary of the narrow passage
tall rock wall forming the right boundary of the canyon

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows into an enclosed rocky canyon with steep stone walls on both sides. The lantern post is now behind, and the character walks through the confined snow-covered passage with sparse vegetation. The sky is visible only as a narrow strip overhead between the rock cliffs, maintaining the cold blue night atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain trail that gradually transforms from an open wilderness into a confined rocky canyon. It begins with the character walking away from the camera across a wide, snow-covered expanse flanked by pine trees and rocky hills under a dark blue cloudy sky. As the character advances, the terrain begins to narrow and the scene shifts toward a lit lantern post on the left, which casts a warm glow over the snow while steeper cliffs encroach from the right. The path then tightens further, transitioning into an enclosed passage with towering stone walls on both sides that obscure the horizon. Finally, the character disappears into the depths of the canyon, where the sky is reduced to a narrow strip of cold blue light overhead.
